name: Qing Dynasty (Triangular Yellow Dragon Flag, 1862–1889)

colors.symbolism: the field — Imperial gold of the Manchu emperors
the Azure Dragon, the eastern guardian
the flaming pearl pursued by the dragon

description: A triangular yellow banner bearing a blue Azure Dragon chasing a red flaming pearl. The first dragon flag of the Qing, with one corner cut off to give a triangular form distinguishing it from the Plain Yellow Banner.
history: Adopted in 1862 as the ensign of Qing naval and official vessels, the triangular Yellow Dragon Flag preceded the rectangular version standardised in 1889. Zeng Guofan removed a corner to distinguish it from the Plain Yellow Banner of the Eight Banners.
